zh.lifeSummary: 當Guigue II Count Of Albon於1025年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆阿爾邦時，他的父親Guigues d' Albon II25歲，母親Adelaide de Beaujeu25歲。他於1050年4月27日與Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1079年1月25日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guigue II Count Of Albon于1025年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆阿爾邦时，他的父亲Guigues d' Albon II25岁，母亲Adelaide de Beaujeu25岁。他于1050年4月27日与Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1079年1月25日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guigue II Count Of Albon was born in 1025, in Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guigues d' Albon II, was 25 and his mother, Adelaide de Beaujeu, was 25. He married Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon on 27 April 1050. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 25 January 1079, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guigue II Count Of Albon est né en 1025, à Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues d' Albon II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Beaujeu, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon le 27 avril 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1079, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guigue II Count Of Albon 1025 in Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guigues d' Albon II 25 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Beaujeu 25. Er hat am 27. April 1050 Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1079 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guigue II Count Of Albon è nato il nel 1025 nel Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guigues d' Albon II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Beaujeu, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon il 27 aprile 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 gennaio 1079, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guigue II Count Of Albonが1025年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメアルボンで生まれた時，父Guigues d' Albon IIは25歳，母Adelaide de Beaujeuは25歳であった。1050年4月27日にPetronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1079年1月25日に故郷で54歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアークルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guigue II Count Of Albon(이)가 1025년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 알본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guigues d' Albon II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Beaujeu(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1050년 4월 27일 Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1079년 1월 25일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 클루니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guigue II Count Of Albon nasceu em 1025, em Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues d' Albon II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Beaujeu, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon em 27 de abril de 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1079, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guigue II Count Of Albon родился в 1025 г. в местности албон, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guigues d' Albon II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Beaujeu, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon 27 апреля 1050 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 января 1079 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности клуни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guigue II Count Of Albon nació en 1025, en Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues d' Albon II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Beaujeu, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Petronille Or Gothelina Countess Of Albon el 27 de abril de 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de enero de 1079, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
